meta.description:
CANCEL Runway & Kling AI! This AI Video Generator does it all - Freepik AI
Try out Freepik AI 👉 https://bit.ly/freepikai 

Updated code 20% discount on annual plan 
Use code dankieft


Luma, Runway, minimax or Kling Ai which ai video generator has your preference? its a tough choice to make when you're in the market for the best ai video generator. But why choose? 

Freepik AI has launched their version of an AI video generator that combines all of these generators into ONE. You can simultaneously generate your prompt through all of the major video generators to get the best results

On top of that you can train a LoRA to create your own characters that you can generate within Flux. This makes it an ai image to video generator with consistent ai characters, extremely powerful!

If you want to try it out, use the code 'danfreepik'

👉My Ai Toolkit - dankieft.carrd.co
